style_effects: Subtle blue-white energy pulses ripple through Voltrorb's metallic seams like liquid electricity, casting sharp reflections of the environment across its polished surface. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion around its body, catching the glow of its internal energy. The aura emits a cool, intense blue light that casts sharp, geometric shadows, enhancing the mechanical precision of its form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
